steps.t: Kala-gijak can be found in eastern Agarnaith. You should go to Kala-gijak.
Faeron and the Red Sky Clan warriors are outside Kala-gijak, preparing to attack. You should meet up with Faeron.
Faeron and the Red Sky Clan warriors are outside Kala-gijak, preparing to attack. You should talk to Faeron.
Faeron and the Drúedain have returned to the village of Bhol Rûdh. You should talk to Faeron.
Parsâ-dhug-Bhêr can be found in the village Bhol Rûdh. You should talk to Parsâ-dhug-Bhêr.
